case_title: LUIS A SANCHEZ VS. JUAN JOSE ARTEAGA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, LUIS A AS TO DEFENDANT ARTEAGA, JUAN JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-05-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARTEAGA, JUAN JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, LUIS A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARTEAGA, JUAN JOSE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED=RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ARTEAGA, JUAN JOSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-21-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: APR-30-2015 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) AS TO DEFENDANT ARTEAGA, JUAN JOSE
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT ARTEAGA, JUAN JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY TODAY THE FULL AMOUNT OWED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ARTEAGA, JUAN JOSE
